description_long: This chest of drawers features a compact, rectangular form with a flat top surface and four short, angled legs that provide stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The front face is equipped with four evenly spaced drawers, each adorned with a round knob handle for easy access. The body of the chest is finished in a muted beige tone, while the drawer fronts appear slightly lighter, creating a subtle two-tone effect. The sides and back are plain, with no visible embellishments or hardware, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall construction suggests a wooden frame, likely with internal compartments for storage. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies, offering both functionality and understated style.
description: A compact, beige chest of drawers with four round-knobbed drawers and angled legs, featuring a minimalist two-tone design. Its clean lines and sturdy build make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with round knob handles and the angled legs beneath.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, solid panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless, flat back panel with no hardware or decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the plainness and depth seen in view 1.
